titles.title: AI/AN CAPTA
AI/AN CAPTA
AI/AN Child Abuse Prevention and Treatment Act
American Indian and Alaska Native Child Abuse Prevention and Treatment Act

A bill to amend the Child Abuse Prevention and Treatment Act to require that equitable distribution of assistance include equitable distribution to Indian Tribes and Tribal organizations, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
